title: berteroa obliqua
intro: Berteroa obliqua, also known as Klamath weed, is a perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Berteroa obliqua include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic for wound healing. Berteroa obliqua is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
